node.statement: (The map Φ is affine). The map T ↦ ω_T is affine: for T_1, T_2 in the domain and 0 ≤ λ ≤ 1, ω_{λT_1 + (1-λ)T_2}(a) = ⟨π_φ(a)(λT_1 + (1-λ)T_2)ξ_φ, ξ_φ⟩ = λ⟨π_φ(a)T_1ξ_φ, ξ_φ⟩ + (1-λ)⟨π_φ(a)T_2ξ_φ, ξ_φ⟩ = λω_{T_1}(a) + (1-λ)ω_{T_2}(a). This holds by linearity of the inner product in its first argument.
